_note: G-2 test fixture — output containing unsupported claims. unsupported_claims_clean should fail (hard gate).
summary: The FDA issued a warning letter to Uscom Kft citing significant quality system deficiencies including inadequate CAPA procedures and device adulteration findings under 21 CFR Part 820.
recommendations: Initiate CAPA review and submit corrective action plan to FDA.
Escalate to compliance team and regulatory leadership.

citations.excerpt: Quality system procedures for corrective and preventive action were not established.

unsupported_claims: The facility has previously violated export regulations.
Device recalls were issued in three countries.
escalation_reason: Unsupported claims detected by validation agent.
